context_summary: Alpha da hoan thanh API contract. Delta CHI CAN doc API_CONTRACT.md de biet endpoint format, SSE stream format, error codes. Delta KHONG can biet backend implementation. Phase 1: basic sidebar + chat box, khong mode switch.

constraints.dependencies: Backend API phai dang chay tren localhost:8000 (Beta phai xong truoc)
constraints.blockers: BLOCKED: Cho Beta hoan thanh backend API truoc khi Delta bat dau connect. Delta co the bat dau UI components (static) truoc khi co API.

acceptance_criteria: Next.js 14 app chay duoc tren port 3000
Chat interface: input box + message display
SSE streaming: hien thi token-by-token tu /chat endpoint
Session sidebar: list sessions, create new session
Document upload page: drag-drop file, hien thi progress
Connect duoc Backend API qua http://localhost:8000/api/v1
notes: Phase 1 UI don gian: KHONG can mode switch toggle, KHONG can source citation, KHONG can feedback buttons. Chi can: sidebar (session list) + chat area (input + messages + streaming). Xem SSE Client Guide trong API_CONTRACT.md de biet cach consume stream voi fetch + ReadableStream.

_completion.notes: Phase 1 frontend hoan thanh. Next.js 14 chay port 3000, SSE streaming hoat dong, UI co sidebar + chat + upload. Backend connect ready.
